description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called clickbuild and a job named click:armhf. Use the clickable/ubuntu-sdk:16.04-armhf Docker image, set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal, and run the command `sh ./scripts/ci-click-build.sh` in the clickbuild stage. Cache the Qt/ and .build/ directories, and configure the job to produce artifacts matching `*.click` that expire after one week and are kept on success. Tag the runner with docker. No additional rules or deployment targets are required.
